Frontend: All features working - Route button visible next to dropdown, clicking Route updates both store list AND map, My Loadouts/New Loadout tabs, zoom controls functional.

features_verified.hierarchical_location_parsing: CStone format like 'Pyro > Pyro V > Ignis > Ashland > shop_terminal' correctly resolves to Bloom Settlement
features_verified.stanton_location_parsing: CStone format like 'Stanton > ArcCorp > Area 18 > TDD > shop_terminal' correctly resolves to Area 18
features_verified.ship_hardpoints: All 16 tested ships have correct weapon hardpoints matching Fleetyards/SCTools data - Arrow [3,3,3], Eclipse [2,2], Corsair [5,5,5,5,4,4,3,3,3,3,3,3], etc.
features_verified.route_button_placement: Route button is visible NEXT TO the Start From dropdown, not inside the map
features_verified.route_updates_both: Clicking Route button with selected origin updates BOTH the store list order AND the SVG route map

seed_data_creation: Created loadout with Cloak shield and Breton power plant for Aurora CL to test shopping list
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 verified: (1) Hierarchical CStone location strings are correctly parsed - 'Pyro > Pyro V > Ignis > Ashland > shop_terminal' resolves to Bloom Settlement, 'Stanton > ArcCorp > Area 18' resolves to Area 18. (2) All ship hardpoints verified against Fleetyards data - Arrow [3,3,3], Eclipse [2,2], Corsair with 12 weapons, Constellation Andromeda with turret S2s, etc. (3) Route button is correctly placed NEXT TO the dropdown and clicking it updates both the store list AND the visual route map. (4) Zoom controls are functional on the route map.
